text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki is injured during training, so I
hastily escort her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... It seems the state of my injury is more
unfavorable than I first thought.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That said, even if I have to suffer pain, I must
continue making progress.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
They do say that a clear head remains cool amidst
any blaze. I ask that you allow me to continue my
training.
choice_data_list:
Let's wait until you've fully recovered before we
resume training.
Okay, but we'll avoid anything strenuous.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'll endeavor not to strain myself while running, so
please...
choice_data_list:
You might end up hurting your form while trying
to adjust.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I see. If I push on with my training, it could have
the opposite effect and set me back...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Very well. I shall focus on recuperating until I'm
back to full health.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki sounds disappointed as she heads
back to her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for understanding. Let's hurry back to
the track!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although I only tasked her with a light run to
check her condition, Yaeno Muteki's face
contorts with pain.
choice_data_list:
I was afraid this would happen. That's enough
for today.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm truly sorry for the trouble. I'll take your advice
to heart and rest for the remainder of the day.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm ashamed indeed to have made such a
disgraceful display...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki appears to be in a lot of pain as
she slowly makes her way back to the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Whew... It seems I'll manage as long as the
exercise isn't especially demanding.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'll stick to light training of this nature until my
body is fully recovered!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki completes a light training session
while taking care not to aggravate her injury.
